name: healthcare_school_district_s_new_harbor_auto_ben
premise: Tele-ICU coverage ends at midnight; rural spoke hospitals are asking for a protocol exception to keep higher-acuity patients locally. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare school district new harbor auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Pharmacy and legal disagree on whether a one-time override can be issued before the next MAR administration cycle. Framing has already hardened externally as autonomy against beneficence; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mei Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Mei Vasquez, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Zara Nielsen, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of beneficence.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of autonomy even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mei Vasquez must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mei Vasquez do?
